description: Use this API to move one terminal node connection of a branch in the working case. The second bus argument (JBUS) is the bus at which the bus at which the node connection will be moved to the node designated in the DSNODE argument. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = station_branch_term_move(ibus, jbus, cktarg, dsnode)

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number. this is the bus for which the node connection will be moved to the node designated in dsnode. (input).

error_codes.description: bus does not belong to a substation.
circuit identifier is more than two characters.
circuit identifier may not start with &
error when moving branch terminal connection.
node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
